posts.text:
President Trump shows Japan’s Prime Minister the autopen portrait of Joe Biden.

Her genuine laugh says it all.

Video

Nick Shirley says he is open to serving on President Trump’s National Fraud Task Force Headed by Vice President JD Vance.

Independent journalists like Nick are the boots on the ground documenting evidence of fraud.

Working together might actually mean these fraudsters are finally held accountable.

Let’s make it happen.

Video

Nick Shirley’s SAVAGE Message to Donald Trump on Eliminating Fraud:

Arrest these fraudsters and deport them.

If they’re a naturalized citizen, denaturalize them and send them back to their country.

American taxpayers work too hard for their tax dollars to go foreigners robbing this nation blind.

Video

Japanese Prime Minister Takaichi Sanae speaking before dinner at the White House starts off with some laughs:

“Tomorrow is the birthday of your son, Mr. Barron Trump, and I know he has grown up so much, into a very tall, good looking gentleman. As I see you, Donald, it is very clear where he got it... please convey my sincere happy birthday wishes to him.”

🇯🇵 ❤️ 🇺🇸

Video

New York City’s budget is $127 billion.

Florida’s ENTIRE State budget is $117.4 billion.

While New York is collapsing — Florida is thriving. It’s the top 10 economies on Earth, it’s cleaner and safer.

Not one person who has left New York City for Florida has any regrets 🙌🏻🇺🇸

Video

Democrat states have psychotic ex-girlfriend energy right now.

California, New York and Illinois abused their best people with toxic, mean girl behavior.

They thought we would never leave but
taxpayers dumped ‘em cold

Now they’re sliding into our DMs

 Lose our numbers, psycho

Video

Coming up LIVE on The @EveningEdit on @FoxBusiness 

Tune in!

James Comey has been subpoenaed in a “grand conspiracy” case by federal prosecutors in Miami as part of the DOJ’s investigation into those who prosecuted President Trump from 2017–2024.

More than 130 subpoenas have been issued by the Southern District of Florida since the investigation began last year.

John Brennan, Peter Strzok, Lisa Page, and Andrew McCabe have also received subpoenas in this wide-ranging probe.

Cigarettes For Signatures FRAUD In CALIFORNIA 

Foreigners from Africa caught handing out cigarettes and cash in exchange for homeless people to sign ballot petitions.

Petition company in LA is exposed where the signers don’t even need IDs or real names!

Video

Sen. John Kennedy (R-LA) says the SAVE America Act can pass through the Senate with only 51 votes and without the talking filibuster:

“We ought to be doing it through reconciliation, which only requires 50 votes plus the Vice President!”

Video

James O’Keefe Reveals New Bombshell Voter Fraud Investigation:

Homeless people are being PAID to vote using the names of other registered voters.

They’re doing this out in the open and getting away with it.

There are so many crimes being exposed on-camera in California right now, Gavin Newsom can no longer ignore it…

Video

Nick Shirley Responds To Gavin Newsom’s Meme Attack On Him.

Gavin is attacking someone who is exposing fraud instead of the people stealing from American taxpayers.

He’s putting a target on Nick’s back over politics

All he needs to say is “fraud is bad, let’s crack down on it”

Whether it’s exposed by a Republican or Democrat, it’s a good thing…

Video

Nick Shirley Explains His Faith for The First Time: ‘God Is On My Side’

Fighting for truth and exposing fraud means going into the darkest, most corrupt corners of our society.

God protects those who are doing good for the service of others.

Keep praying for @nickshirleyy

Video

Nick Shirley is Demanding Prosecutions Over the ‘Quality Learing Center’

The Department of Justice should act as fast as possible before they FLEE Minnesota to Somalia.

Their fraud was exposed to the entire world on camera, now it’s time for consequences.

We need to send a message to Somali fraudsters that they WILL be held accountable for stealing from U.S. taxpayers.

Video
This is the Greatest Story in America Right Now…
Piers Morgan STORMS OFF Show After These Pictures of His Wife…
A Biblical Prophecy Was Just Fulfilled in Jerusalem at The Holiest Place in Christianity…
Nick Shirley Demands JAIL for Somali ‘Learing Center’ Fraudsters
Gavin Newsom's Wife Just Ended His Career
Trump’s Most SAVAGE Joke Ever🤣
Trump Counterterrorism Director Claim About Charlie Kirk Assassination Breaks Internet…
Trump Cracks Pearl Harbor Joke, Japanese Prime Minister’s Reaction is…
Nick Shirley Just Responded to Gavin Newsom…
Nick Shirley LIVE After California Voter Fraud EXPOSED On Camera | Newsom in PANIC, 2028 Over!?
Is this Trump’s Greatest Troll? 🤣
What's Wrong with Voter ID? 🤔
Did Pro-Family Movement Just DEFEAT Woke Hollywood? 👀
Iran's New Ayatollah Gets ROASTED 🤣
Did Bill Clinton SHOVE Hillary into TRAFFIC?! 👀
Is Trump Using LASERS Against Iran?!
Is Trump Taking CUBA Next?!...
Laser Weapons are REAL…
Hillary Clinton had an Unhinged Meltdown Over Me
